creator: raj@csub.edu
text:
On 01/15/2010 11:14 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/puppet,
>
> Please note that PR ports/142868 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/142868
>

Oh damn. I was just in the middle of updating all my nodes to 0.25.2 still ;-).

0.25.2 is working great so far after a little twiddling with apache/passenger; so, I'm a 
little worried about new regressions in this version. However, I'll  but go ahead and 
approve the patch anyway.

-- 
Russell A. Jackson <raj@csub.edu>
Network Analyst
California State University, Bakersfield
